message:
fix: resolve CI lint and test failures on main

Lint fixes:
- Fix "behaviour" misspelling to "behavior" in doltserver.go
- Suppress unparam for bdDepListRawIDs depType (kept for API generality)
- Suppress unparam for checkPressure role (kept for caller context)

Test fixes:
- AgentEnv dog role: set GT_DOG_NAME and use deacon/dogs/ BD_ACTOR format
- AgentEnv dolt port: propagate GT_DOLT_PORT/BEADS_DOLT_PORT from process
  env when not resolved from config (GH#2412)
- Convoy commands: use town root (not .beads/) as bd working directory,
  strip BEADS_DIR from subprocess env, add --flat for JSON list output
- getTrackedIssues: use bd dep list instead of bd sql, with fallback to
  bd show for cross-database deps that return empty from dep list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
